companyNameJapanese: 河南光力科技股份有限公司
description: Chinese semiconductor dicing saw manufacturer. Originally a coal mine safety monitoring equipment company (founded 1994). Entered semiconductor dicing via 2019 acquisition of Israel's ADT (Advanced Dicing Technologies) for $37M. One of only two companies globally (with DISCO) to manufacture both dicing saws and high-precision air-bearing spindles in-house.

_externalRelationships.notes: Listed on Shenzhen ChiNext (300480.SZ). ADT subsidiary (Israel) is world's #3 dicing saw maker. ADT dicing equipment achieves 0.1 micrometer precision control. Building semiconductor intelligent manufacturing base in Zhengzhou. Chinese domestic dicing market ~5% penetration vs DISCO 70% and ACCRETECH 10%. ~60B CNY global dicing market. Key player in China's semiconductor equipment localization drive.

_metadata.dataSource: ADT website, Zhihu, Jiuyangongshe, industry reports
